  • Method Details

    • setAddress

      public ChCoreOrganizationEpr setAddress(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Address address)
      Sets the organization's address. If the address already exists, it's replaced.
      Parameters:
      address - the organization's address.
      Returns:
      this.
